title: Post-colonoscopy surgical follow-up
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports documenting the endoscopic procedure context and indication or intended aim as known clinical-record information.
assessment.rationale: Supports known endoscopic indication and procedure context for post-colonoscopy surgical follow-up; no decision is generated.

source.title: British Society of Gastroenterology guidelines on sedation in gastrointestinal endoscopy
source.population: People undergoing gastrointestinal endoscopy with recommendation-specific sedation, procedure, age, and comorbidity contexts.
source.setting: Endoscopy pre-assessment, procedure, recovery, and discharge.
source.exclusions: Exact only for selected procedure-context, monitored-recovery, discharge-assessment, follow-up-planning, and safety-instruction documentation. It does not support retrospective diagnosis, pathology interpretation, treatment, or universal post-endoscopy follow-up.

exact_location.heading: Pre-assessment — indication, intended aim, and procedure context

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting the endoscopic procedure context and indication or intended aim as known clinical-record information.

assessment.text: Supports documenting recovery progress, baseline consciousness or function, vital monitoring, complications during recovery, information exchange, follow-up planning, and discharge advice.
assessment.rationale: Supports recovery, complication, information and follow-up documentation after sedation for post-colonoscopy surgical follow-up; no decision is generated.

source.title: British Society of Gastroenterology guidelines on sedation in gastrointestinal endoscopy

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting recovery progress, baseline consciousness or function, vital monitoring, complications during recovery, information exchange, follow-up planning, and discharge advice.

assessment.text: Supports formal documented discharge assessment, recovery from sedation, absence of complications, vital and respiratory status, pain or discomfort review, procedure-appropriate instructions, contact information, and activity restrictions after sedation.
assessment.rationale: Supports documented recovery assessment and discharge instructions after sedation for post-colonoscopy surgical follow-up; no decision is generated.
